g.text: User authentication by the Wallet Instance or by a WSCA
User selects the proximity presentation functionality
[Mandatory if Step 2 is not performed by WSCA]
data exchange over QR code or NFC
Prepare a signed and encrypted attribute
message exchanged over BLE or NFC secure channel
Request approval for presenting selected attributes,
Send a signed and encrypted response (
with requested attributes over a BLE or NFC secure channel
